task: Advanced high-value task: Single-Cell Doublet Detection Sample Counterfactual Remediation Study. Scenario: a platform owner wants to convert ambiguous measurements into deterministic review actions for single-cell doublet detection sample. Embedded packet: Records: R1 expected_doublet_pct=31 detected_doublet_pct=52 median_genes=8; R2 expected_doublet_pct=40 detected_doublet_pct=48 median_genes=11; R3 expected_doublet_pct=26 detected_doublet_pct=63 median_genes=7. Remediation options: O1 changes expected_doublet_pct by -12% cost=72500; O2 changes detected_doublet_pct by -18% cost=91700; O3 changes median_genes by -25% cost=52300; max_budget=116400. Rules and constraints: detected>1.8x expected suggests overcall; detected<0.6x expected suggests undercall; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: perform a sensitivity check around the governing threshold and identify records whose classification is unstable. Deliver single_cell_doublet_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
